templates/ORCHESTRATOR.md.tmpl and internal/scaffold/templates/ORCHESTRATOR.md.tmpl receive the same Agent Mail Registration section to keep the public template and embedded scaffold template aligned.

conditions.message: The payload strengthens real coordination evidence: it requires Agent Mail registration before work starts, treats unregistered panes as undispatched, and requires identities in completion/verdict messages rather than accepting terminal wakes or anonymous reports as sufficient.
evidence: The orchestrator template says every sub-agent spawned or woken must register with Agent Mail before starting work and that a pane or worker that has not registered is not considered dispatched.
The prompt-bank verifier-packet-relay prompt says the mail and wake must instruct the verifier to register and that a pane that has not registered is not considered dispatched.
The verifier-bootstrap and verifier-standby prompts require ensure_project plus register_agent or macro_start_session before work starts and require reporting the Agent Mail identity.
The packet-not-received-status prompt requires an unregistered recipient to register first and include the Agent Mail identity in the reply.
